parameters: \daliaWelcome to Dalia's Bear 'n Grille! Is this your first time here?
You don't look like you're from the desert... so, welcome!
I'm Dalia, obviously... mind if I ask for your name?
\daliaWelcome in, \c[1]\V[207]\c[0]! It's harsh out there, but I sell
cooking supplies and various ingredients you can use
to spice up your travels. You interested?
\daliaIt's actually perfect timing that you asked that...
I'm trying to revive an old family recipe right now!
\daliaManaging the store all on my own is taxing, though,
and I haven't had much time or funds to acquire
\dalia...but you know what? If you can get me those ingredients,
maybe the secret family recipe doesn't have to be so secret...
\daliaI guess I can tell you what it is... it's a pie!
Hopefully that gets you excited! I don't even
\daliaJust be careful hunting those snakes, they'll unleash the poison
within their glands if they feel threatened! If you're scared at

\daliaWelcome in, \c[1]\V[207]\c[0]! It's harsh out there, but I sell
cooking supplies and various ingredients you can use
to spice up your travels. You interested?
\daliaYou... you actually did it! I honestly forgot that I asked.
Finally, my family's old recipe can be revived. Thank you!
\daliaRight, Dalia, you can make a pie...
\daliaNo disrespect to great-grandma, but that wasn't as hard to bake as she made it out to be.
All you need is the right ingredients and the right recipe, and anyone can make a pie
just as delicious as she used to! By Trailia, what a woman she was...
\daliaI'll also give you the recipe, as promised.
Cook it up at a fire using a \ii[289]\c[0]!
\daliaThat's not everything I asked for... c'mon,
I'm a busy person, don't waste my time!
\daliaScared of the snakes? Just be careful... once you've got 'em injured

the thought of poisonous infections, it might not be a bad idea to

\daliaThanks for choosing Dalia's Bear 'n Grille! Come again!
\daliaIf you really want to, just talk to me.

could you even be mad at him? Just
